prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response:
Alright, listen up! You've got this, buddy. I know you've been putting it off all morning, but guess what? You're stronger than you think. That task may seem daunting, but remember, you've tackled bigger challenges before and come out victorious.

So, take a deep breath, stand tall, and dive right in. You're not just capable; you're unstoppable. Remember why you're doing this - maybe it's for your career, your education, or your personal growth. Whatever it is, it's worth it. 

Don't focus on how hard it is, focus on how amazing you'll feel once it's done. You'll look back and be proud of yourself for facing the challenge head-on. You've got the skills, the determination, and the grit to see this through. So let's go! Show that task who's boss!
